Name: Classic Cotton Tee
Short description: Everyday essential. 100% ring-spun cotton, pre-shrunk, relaxed fit.
Description: Our most popular piece. Crafted from heavyweight 180gsm ring-spun cotton with a clean, unbranded finish. Available in natural, slate, and terracotta. Pre-washed for softness right out of the bag.

Name: Heavyweight Hoodie
Short description: Structured warmth. Brushed fleece interior, kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs.
Description: Built for layering season. 380gsm fleece with a structured hood and flat-lock stitching throughout. Washes well and holds its shape.

Name: Linen Camp Shirt
Short description: Breathable, relaxed, effortless. 100% European linen, button front.
Description: A summer wardrobe staple. Stonewashed European linen with a camp collar and single chest pocket. Gets better with every wash.

Name: Canvas Market Tote
Short description: Heavy-duty canvas. Reinforced base, 12-inch drop handles, inside zip pocket.
Description: The bag you reach for every day. 16oz waxed canvas with vegetable-tanned leather strap reinforcements and solid brass hardware. Holds a weekend's worth of groceries.

Name: Slim Leather Wallet
Short description: 6-card capacity. Full-grain leather, no-fuss design, slim profile.
Description: Holds what you need and nothing you don't. Saddle-stitched full-grain leather with a natural pull-up finish that develops a patina over time.

Name: Woven Seagrass Basket
Short description: Hand-woven seagrass with cotton rope handles. Storage that looks good out.
Description: Handmade by artisans in Morocco. Each basket is slightly unique. Use it for everything — throws, magazines, farmers market trips.

Name: Ceramic Pour-Over Set
Short description: Hand-thrown ceramic dripper and carafe. Makes two cups at once.
Description: Hand-thrown on the wheel, high-fire glazed, food safe. Pairs with any standard #4 filter. Carafe holds 500ml. Dishwasher safe but more fun to hand wash.

Name: Beeswax Candle Trio
Short description: Pure beeswax pillars. Clean burn, natural honey scent, no additives.
Description: Made from 100% domestic beeswax. Burns at a higher temperature than paraffin, producing negative ions that clear the air. Set of three: 2-inch, 3-inch, and 4-inch pillars.

Name: Linen Tea Towel Set
Short description: Set of three. Pre-washed Belgian linen. Gets more absorbent with every wash.
Description: A kitchen essential. Each towel is 50×70cm, hemstitched at the edges, with a loop for hanging. The natural linen weave gets softer and more absorbent over time.

Name: Hardcover Journal
Short description: A5 format. Lay-flat binding, 160 pages, fountain pen friendly paper.
Description: Smyth-sewn binding opens completely flat without cracking the spine. 100gsm acid-free paper takes fountain pen ink without bleed-through. Bookmark ribbon included.

Name: Brass Rollerball Pen
Short description: Solid brass body with matte finish. Replaceable rollerball refill.
Description: Gets better as it ages. The raw brass develops a natural patina with use. Includes one black rollerball refill compatible with standard Cross-style cartridges.

Name: Wax Seal Stamp Kit
Short description: Classic S monogram stamp, sealing wax sticks in four colors, brass ladle.
Description: Everything you need to seal envelopes, wrap gifts, or emboss your correspondence. Comes in a fitted cloth bag with the stamp, ladle, and four wax sticks in cream, forest, terracotta, and charcoal.
